title: GMRC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for General Manager, Joint General Manager and More Posts
shortInfo: Gujarat Metro Rail Corporation (GMRC) has published the Various Civil Posts Notification 2026 on 16-05-2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 5 Various Civil Posts positions. Candidates within the maximum age limit of 62 years (post-wise age criteria applicable) and holding B.E/B.Tech in Civil Engineering or Graduate in Civil/Mechanical/Electrical Engineering with Diploma in Industrial Safety are eligible to apply online at GMRC Official Website. The application process will be active from 16-05-2026 to 30-05-2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and apply link below.

basic_details.job_title: GMRC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for General Manager, Joint General Manager and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Gujarat Metro Rail Corporation (GMRC) has published the Various Civil Posts Notification 2026 on 16-05-2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 5 Various Civil Posts positions. Candidates within the maximum age limit of 62 years (post-wise age criteria applicable) and holding B.E/B.Tech in Civil Engineering or Graduate in Civil/Mechanical/Electrical Engineering with Diploma in Industrial Safety are eligible to apply online at GMRC Official Website. The application process will be active from 16-05-2026 to 30-05-2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and apply link below.

age_limit.age_details: Max age as on 16.05.2026: Contract: 57 years, Deputation: 58 years, Post-superannuation: 62 years (for General Manager). Varies for other posts.
age_limit.details: Maximum age as on 16.05.2026: Contract: 57 years, Deputation: 58 years, Post-superannuation: 62 years (for General Manager). Age varies for other posts. For all posts, the maximum age limit is 62 years.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E/ B.Tech in Civil Engineering, Graduate in Civil/ Mechanical/ Electrical Engineering along with Diploma in Industrial Safety
qualification.details: General Manager (Civil - Maintenance): B.E/ B.Tech in Civil Engineering from a Govt. recognized University/ Institute. Joint General Manager/ Sr. Deputy General Manager/ Deputy General Manager (Civil - Maintenance): B.E/ B.Tech in Civil Engineering from a Govt. recognized University/ Institute. Joint General Manager/ Sr. Deputy General Manager/ Deputy General Manager (Civil- QA/QC): B.E/ B.Tech in Civil Engineering from a Govt. recognized University/ Institute. Sr. Deputy General Manager/ Deputy General Manager (Civil-Underground/Tunnel/ Elevated): B.E / B. Tech in Civil Engineering from a Govt. recognized University/ Institute. Deputy General Manager (Civil-Safety): Graduate in Civil/ Mechanical/ Electrical Engineering from a Govt. recognized University/ Institute along with minimum one-year duration full time Diploma in Industrial Safety from a Govt. recognized University / Institution /body.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Joint General Manager/ Sr. Deputy General Manager/ Deputy General Manager (Civil - Maintenance)
Joint General Manager/ Sr. Deputy General Manager/ Deputy General Manager (Civil- QA/QC)
Sr. Deputy General Manager/ Deputy General Manager (Civil-Underground/Tunnel/ Elevated)

salary_details.details: General Manager (Civil - Maintenance): Revised IDA scale of ₹ 120000-280000 (Approx. CTC ₹ 3.5 Lacs per month) Joint General Manager/ Sr. Deputy General Manager/ Deputy General Manager (Civil - Maintenance): Revised IDA scale of ₹ 90000-240000/ ₹ 80000-220000 / ₹70000-200000 (Approx. CTC ₹ 2.6 Lacs/₹ 2.4 Lacs/ ₹ 2.1 Lacs per month) Joint General Manager/ Sr. Deputy General Manager/ Deputy General Manager (Civil- QA/QC): Revised IDA scale of ₹ 90000-240000/ ₹ 80000-220000 / ₹70000-200000 (Approx. CTC ₹ 2.6 Lacs/₹ 2.4 Lacs/ ₹ 2.1 Lacs per month) Sr. Deputy General Manager/ Deputy General Manager (Civil-Underground/Tunnel/ Elevated): Revised IDA scale of ₹ 80000-220000 / ₹70000-200000 (Approx. CTC ₹ 2.4 Lacs/ ₹ 2.1 Lacs per month) Deputy General Manager (Civil-Safety): Revised IDA scale of ₹ 70000-200000 (Approx. CTC ₹ 2.1 Lacs per month)

selection_process: Personal Interview Document Verification Medical Examination
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the GMRC Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of GMRC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for GMRC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Gujarat Metro Rail Corporation (GMRC) recruitment is 30th May 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this GMRC recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced for various Civil Posts in the Gujarat Metro Rail Corporation (GMRC) recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification generally requires a B.E/ B.Tech in Civil Engineering. For the Civil-Safety post, a graduate degree in Civil/ Mechanical/ Electrical Engineering along with a Diploma in Industrial Safety is necessary.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the GMRC posts?
faq.answer: The salary for these posts ranges from Rs. 70,000 to Rs. 2,80,000 per month, with specific scales mentioned for each post in the detailed notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for applying to GMRC jobs?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit varies by post type (Contract, Deputation, Post-superannuation), with the General Manager post having a maximum age of 62 years. The age is calculated as of 16th May 2026.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for GMRC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, according to the official notification, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for GMRC Various Civil Posts?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves a Personal Interview, followed by Document Verification and a Medical Examination.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Gujarat apply for these positions?
faq.answer: The notification specifies the organization is Gujarat Metro Rail Corporation, located in Gujarat. While not explicitly stated that only Gujarat residents can apply, candidates should check the detailed notification for any state-specific eligibility criteria.

faq.question: Q9. What is the mode of application for GMRC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for the GMRC Various Civil Posts recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official website.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF for the GMRC Recruitment 2026 can be downloaded from the "Important Links" section of this article, under the "Official Notification PDF" description.
